## Summary

- What problem does this change solve?
- What user or maintainer workflow improves?

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] Relevant CLI or validation command documented in the PR
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing or maintainer-facing behavior changed

## Security review

- [ ] No secrets, private keys, or sensitive datasets were added
- [ ] CI permissions remain least-privilege
- [ ] New dependencies are necessary and actively maintained
- [ ] Any numerical or operational risk is documented

## Notes for reviewers

- Key files to inspect:
- Follow-up work, if any:
